text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring grand prix, the Takarazuka Kinen,
attracts the best of the best, with each runner
seeking something different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some desire proof that they stand on top of their
generation. Others want a stepping stone abroad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But for Tosen Jordan, all that matters is beating
Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That simple-minded determination gets a
surprised laugh out of Nakayama Festa... and also
lights a fire in her.
